caption:
The campus security badge clipped to my lapel felt heavy, a secret weight that matched the tension in my chest. I smoothed the silk of my blouse under the blazer, knowing the fabric strained against my chest, hiding the fullness of my breasts beneath layers of professional fabric. 🎓✨ It was 11 PM, the only hour the History department allowed for private tutorials. The door creaked open, and Julian walked in, the air shifting instantly from sterile to electric. He leaned against the desk, eyes dark and hungry. 'The thesis,' he said, a smirk playing on his lips as he watched my hands move over my blazer. 'Or something else?' I stepped closer, the pencil skirt hugging my hips, my curves concealed but undeniable under the fitted cotton. The scent of old books mixed with my jasmine perfume, intoxicating the silence. 😏 He reached out, his fingertips grazing the edge of my sleeve, tracing the seam where my blouse met the blazer. 'You're distracting me,' he whispered. 'Maybe that's the point,' I replied, tilting my head, letting the low light catch the definition of my collarbone. In the corner, the projector hummed, ready for a lecture we wouldn't finish. My phone buzzed in my pocket, an Instagram notification lighting up the screen, reminding me that the digital world was already watching the performance. 📱🌙 As he moved closer, the line between mentor and muse dissolved into something far more intense. I adjusted my glasses, the click echoing in the quiet room. 'Let's make this assignment unforgettable,' I said, and the room felt smaller, hotter, more alive than ever. I watched him trace the fabric again, feeling the heat rise in my cheeks. 'Start with the analysis,' he murmured, his voice rough. I opened the folder, my fingers trembling slightly, but his hand covered mine, pressing me closer to the desk. The leather creaked, a sound swallowed by the silence. 'Just one thing,' I whispered back, leaning into his touch. The night stretched out, and the world outside the windows blurred into darkness.

#UniversityTeacher #AcademicRomance #ProfessorLife #CampusLife #SecretDesires #InstaTeach #MidnightStudy #CurvesAndBooks
